questionnaire-agent.welcome.message.value: Welcome! I'm ready to begin the questionnaire. This will take about 15 minutes.

questionnaire-agent.initialPrompt.templa.value: Start the questionnaire with the first question.

questionnaire-agent.plugins.0.steps.0.co.value: Read the conversation history with the user and formulate a message that will bring them back to the dialog. Use the approach you think will be most effective for this particular person.

questionnaire-agent.plugins.0.steps.1.co.value: Read the conversation history with the user and formulate a message that will bring them back to the dialog. Use the approach you think will be most effective for this particular person.

success-message.content.value: ✅ Thank you for completing the questionnaire! Your responses have been successfully submitted and exported.

end.content.value: Thank you for completing the questionnaire! Your responses have been submitted.

exit-timeout.content.value: Session timed out. You can return and continue the questionnaire later.
